payload.title: Request narada-andrey Inquiry Space D3 graph HTML generator lift
payload.summary: Narada proper requests the implemented Inquiry Space D3 graph HTML generator from narada-andrey for evaluation and possible inclusion in Narada proper packages.

requested_artifact.name: Inquiry Space D3 graph HTML generator
expected_material: source files or package path for the implemented generator
fixture or sample input/output used to prove graph rendering

requested_material_only: fixtures with synthetic or non-private data

payload.reason: Operator requested the implemented generator from narada-andrey so Narada proper can include the reusable machinery under packages without copying private Inquiry Space data.

requested_response.preferred_form: patch, archive, branch, or inbox/package handoff containing implementation-only material

promotion.note: recorded_pending_crossing: executable promotion for target kind 'operator_action' is not implemented yet.
